# beatmap · 勘冴えて悔しいわ (8-bit)
# format:  time_seconds  direction
# direction:  0=left  1=up  2=right  3=down
# bpm: 150
# lead_in: 3
# approach_rate: 0.4
# snap_div: 4
#
# NOTE: times are in GAME-CLOCK space.
# The song starts playing at t=lead_in (3s after game start).
# First arrows arrive just after the song begins.
